name: freebird-ai
description: AI coding assistant — 20 free AI edits/day, no setup. Copilot alternative with multi-file edits, BYOK (Claude, GPT-4o, DeepSeek), local Ollama, inline edit, AI commit. Pro $6/mo.

walkthroughs.title: Get started with Freebird AI
walkthroughs.description: 20 free cloud edits a day, no setup — from install to your first AI edit in under a minute.

steps.title: Pick how Freebird runs
steps.description:
Freebird works out of the box with **20 free cloud edits/day** (Gemini Flash) — no setup needed. Prefer unlimited local AI or your own API key? Configure that here anytime.
[Configure AI Backend](command:freebird.configure)

steps.title: Sign in with GitHub
steps.description:
Signing in with GitHub verifies your free daily quota is really yours — it takes 10 seconds and doesn't need a password.
[Sign in with GitHub](command:freebird.signInWithGitHub)

steps.title: Make your first AI edit
steps.description:
Open the Freebird chat, select some code and press **Ctrl+Alt+K** (**Cmd+Alt+K** on Mac) for an inline edit, or just ask a question in the sidebar.
[Open Freebird Chat](command:freebird.openChat)

steps.title: Learn the shortcuts
steps.description:
Type `/help` in the chat anytime for the full command list — `/commit`, `/status`, `@filename` mentions, and your current quota.
`Ctrl+Alt+O` / `Cmd+Alt+O` — open chat
`Ctrl+Alt+K` / `Cmd+Alt+K` — inline edit selection

steps.title: Need more? Go unlimited
steps.description:
Pro removes the daily cap entirely and adds BYOK (Claude, GPT-4o, DeepSeek) plus project memory — $6/month.
[Upgrade to Pro](command:freebird.upgradeToPro)

enumDescriptions: Freebird Cloud (Gemini Flash) — works instantly, 5 free edits/day, no setup
Local AI via Ollama — unlimited, 100% private, runs on your machine
Anthropic Claude API — BYOK, direct-to-LLM speed (Pro)
DeepSeek API — BYOK, advanced reasoning model (Pro)
Qwen 2.5 API (DashScope) — BYOK, powerful coding model (Pro)
freebird.backend.description: AI backend to use for Freebird

freebird.apiKey.markdownDescription: API key for cloud AI backends (Anthropic or OpenAI). Leave blank if using Ollama.

freebird.model.markdownDescription:
Model override. Leave blank for the recommended default per backend:
- Ollama: `qwen2.5-coder`
- Anthropic: `claude-haiku-4-5`
- OpenAI: `gpt-4o-mini`
- DeepSeek: `deepseek-reasoner`
- Qwen: `qwen2.5-coder-32b-instruct`

Tip: for heavier multi-file agent tasks (Pro), try `claude-sonnet-4-6` — it follows multi-step instructions more reliably than Haiku, at a higher API cost.

freebird.ollamaUrl.description: Ollama server URL (only needed if Ollama runs on a non-default port)

freebird.licenseKey.markdownDescription: Freebird Pro license key (format: `FB-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX`). Get one at [buy.stripe.com](https://buy.stripe.com/9B628t4WheMmeSMccZfAc03).

freebird.tabCompletion.enabled.description: Show inline AI code completions (ghost text) as you type.

freebird.tabCompletion.delay.description: Milliseconds to wait after typing stops before requesting a completion.

freebird.telemetry.enabled.markdownDescription: Allow Freebird to collect anonymous usage statistics (feature usage counts, no code or personal data). Helps us improve the extension.
